payload.answer: I already have Sara recorded as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify which relationship is correct, or whether these refer to two different people named Sara.
citations: Existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
New input: Sara is my niece.

entity_resolution.reason: The new mention uses the same name, Sara, and appears to refer to the same person as the existing memory.

details: No durable memory was committed because the new statement conflicts with an existing relationship memory.

repair_options: Keep the existing memory: Sara is your daughter.
Replace the existing memory with: Sara is your niece.
Record that there are two different people named Sara, one your daughter and one your niece.
Record both only if both relationships are intentionally true.
